terminal.title: Organizations
terminal.description: Select an organization to access its terminal modules and member management.
terminal.noOrgsDescription: Create your first organization to get started or get invited to join an existing one.

settings.title: User Settings
settings.noOrgs: You are not a member of any organization.
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently deletes your account, all owned organizations, and removes you from all other organizations.

adminOverview.title: Overview
adminOverview.manageDiscordDesc: View bot servers, disconnect from servers

adminOrgs.title: Organizations
adminOrgs.orgCount: {count, plural, one {# organization registered} other {# organizations registered}}

adminDiscord.label: Super Admin · Discord Bot
adminDiscord.title: Discord Servers
adminDiscord.active: Bot is active on {count, plural, one {# server} other {# servers}}.
adminDiscord.inactive: Bot is not active on any Discord servers, or the bot token is unavailable.

adminComponents.leaveWarning: The bot will leave this server and any linked organization will lose its Discord integration.
adminComponents.noEligibleMembers: No eligible members to transfer ownership to.
adminComponents.transferWarning: The current owner will be demoted to admin. This action is logged.

dashboard.title: Organization Overview
dashboard.forbiddenMessage: You are not a member of this organization.
dashboard.discordHintAdmin: Connect a Discord server in <settings>Settings</settings> to enable slash commands, transaction embeds, and member invites.
dashboard.discordHintMember: Ask an admin to connect a Discord server to enable slash commands and member invites.

members.title: Member Management
members.description: Invite users, manage roles, and review pending member onboarding.
members.discordNotConnected: Connect a Discord server to enable Discord-based invites.
members.forbiddenMessage: Only organization admins & owners can access member management.
members.connectDiscordDesc: Add the bot to the server used by this organization. After authorization, the selected server will be linked automatically.
members.discordDmDesc: Select a member from the connected Discord server and send a private invite link.
members.startTyping: Start typing to search members from the connected Discord server.
members.noPendingInvitesDesc: There are currently no open invitations for this organization.
members.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the organization?

inventory.title: Item Management
inventory.description: View all inventory entries. Owners and admins can add and configure items.
inventory.addItemDesc: Create a new item or reuse an existing one for this organization.
inventory.existingDesc: This item already exists globally. Only inventory values are needed.
inventory.newDesc: This item does not exist yet. Add item details and inventory values.
inventory.filterOfficial: Show only items that are not sold in in-game shops.
inventory.noVariants: No other variants found for this item.
inventory.searchPlaceholder: Search by item name, category, description...
inventory.noMatchingItemsDesc: No inventory items matched your search.
inventory.detailsDesc: Review inventory details and transaction history.
inventory.name: Name
inventory.noTransactions: No transactions for this item yet.
inventory.dangerWarning: By deleting this item, all associated data will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
inventory.removeItemConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the organization inventory?

transactions.title: Trade Requests
transactions.descAdmin: All buy/sell requests for this organization.
transactions.descMember: Your buy/sell requests with this organization.
transactions.noTransactionsDesc: No trade requests have been made yet.
transactions.forbiddenMessage: You are not a member of this organization.
transactions.notePlaceholder: Any details for the other party...

logs.title: Audit Log
logs.description: Review who did what and when inside this organization.
logs.noMatchingLogsDesc: No audit log entries matched your search.
logs.noLogs: No audit log entries have been recorded yet.
logs.forbiddenMessage: Only organization owners can access audit logs.
logs.detailsDesc: Full details for the selected log entry.

orgSettings.title: Organization Settings
orgSettings.description: Configure integrations and notifications for your organization.
orgSettings.forbiddenMessage: Only organization admins & owners can access settings.
orgSettings.channelHelp: Connect a Discord server to this organization first (Members page) to configure a notification channel.
orgSettings.noChannel: Leave empty to disable transaction notifications.
orgSettings.connectDesc: Add the bot to the server used by this organization. After authorization, the selected server will be linked automatically.

quickRef.sellWhat: Create a sell request (member → org) via Discord
quickRef.buyWhat: Create a buy request (org → member) via Discord
quickRef.noteText: To use slash commands or interact with embeds, your Discord account must be the one you used to log in to this terminal. The bot matches Discord user IDs to terminal accounts via the OAuth login.
